The '''CC-9600 frigate''' was a [[CC-series capital ship]], designed by the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] and used during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Characteristics==
The CC-9600 design was based on the earlier [[CC-7700 frigate/Legends|CC-7700 frigate]] series, but did not mount the latter's trademark [[Gravity well projector/Legends|gravity well projectors]]. As such, it had a decidedly different tactical role, namely that of a [[Warship/Legends|warship]] instead of an [[Interdictor/Legends|Interdictor]]. More compact and more heavily armed, it served as a line [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]]. The CC-9600 had enough cargo and passenger space to transport one full [[Regiment/Legends|regiment]] of troops.<ref name="Reb" /> It also was very fast for its size, both in sublight speeds and in [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], making for a formidable warship in its class. Streamlined for atmospheric operation, it had retractable maneuvering fins that improved stabilization while landing and deploying troops.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] {{1st}}
